title: Delhi High Court attaches Rohini judge to judicial academy after heated courtroom exchange goes viral
description: The Delhi High Court on Sunday ordered the attachment of District Judge Rakesh Kumar to the Delhi Judicial Academy after a video showing him in a heated exchange with a lawyer went viral on social media.The decision to relieve Kumar of judicial work comes on the heels of the Coordination Committee of All District Court Bar Associations Delhi’s call to suspend judicial work on Monday across district courts in Delhi.According to an order released by the High Court Registrar General, the Chief Just
